query_normalized: predicting insect pollinator networks from floral trait data biology
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (a) and (e) as it models the fundamental mechanism of plant-pollinator network formation and structure based on species traits (specifically "degree of generalism"), providing the canonical theoretical baseline for how trait data influences network topology in this empirical domain.
